items.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
items.description: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.

items.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 10 in Lebanon, officials say
items.description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.

items.title: Katseye's Manon to take 'temporary hiatus' to focus on health
items.description: The six-person girl group say the decision was made following "open and thoughtful conversations together".

items.title: Trump brings in new 10% tariff as Supreme Court rejects his global import taxes
items.description: The Supreme Court decision striking down some of Trump's most sweeping tariffs injects new uncertainty into global trade.

items.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
items.description: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.
